title: Error Recovery
description: DelegatingChatClient middleware classifies errors and applies targeted recovery strategies.

steps.annotation: A large request that may trigger context or token limit errors.

steps.content: I'll read the auth module and plan the refactor.
steps.annotation: The model begins working on the task.

steps.content: LLM call failed: max_tokens (response was truncated)
steps.annotation: The model ran out of output tokens. Recovery middleware classifies the error.

steps.content: classify_error -> max_tokens: escalate max_tokens from 4096 to 8192, retry
steps.annotation: Recovery strategy: increase the token budget and retry the same request.

steps.content: I'll continue the refactor with the expanded token budget. The auth module needs three changes...
steps.annotation: The retry succeeds with the escalated token limit.

steps.content: LLM call failed: prompt_too_long (context window exceeded)
steps.annotation: After many tool calls, the context grew too large.

steps.content: classify_error -> prompt_too_long: trigger reactive compact, retry
steps.annotation: Recovery strategy: compress the context window and retry.

steps.content: reactive_compact: summarize older messages, preserve recent context
steps.annotation: The compaction middleware reduces context size while keeping task-relevant information.

steps.content: After context compaction, I can continue. The remaining changes are in the session handler.
steps.annotation: The retry succeeds with the compacted context.
